title: DacessZ
body:
# ![Logo DacessZ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56bc4c1347e20893332f390f70550b6ebfad36ea_0.webp)
### Overview
Made for Fabric, a mod pack that includes a collection of mods that complement each other perfectly and transform the world into a challenging zombie apocalypse survival experience. Multiplayer is recommended.
### Content
- Plenty of cities, dungeons and structures to explore and loot
- Some interesting spider-like mobs, and one spider boss
- Aggressive creatures lurking in the sea
- Lots of crafteable firearms and vehicles
- Increased difficulty after reaching certain game stages
- Improved AI, attributes, and behaviors of undead mobs
- Waystones, gravestones, backpacks, and a handy map
- Game changing mechanics, including infection, thirst and bleeding
- A few quality of life tweaks
- Dynamic lighting and darker nights
- Some creepy and eerie stuff...
- Optional resource packs to enhance the visuals
- Removed phantoms (lol)

**You can check the mods included in the dependencies section when selecting a version**
